hide_identity: Hide identity by default on all reports
click_camera: Click the camera icon to upload
name: Name
where_impact: Where are you making an impact?
password_hint: Must be 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, number, & symbol. Leave blank to keep current.
image_upload_failed: Failed to upload image. Please try again.
profile_update_failed: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
flag_reason_desc: Please select a reason for flagging this issue. This helps us understand and review the report appropriately.
share_desc: Share this link with others to let them view this issue.
anyone_with_link: Anyone with this link can view this issue.
audio_size_limit: Audio file size must be less than 5 MB.
image_size_limit: Image file size must be less than 30 MB.
mic_error: Could not access microphone. Please ensure permissions are granted.
audio_limit_exceeded: Recorded audio exceeds 5 MB limit. Please try a shorter message.
add_message_file: Add a message about this file (optional)...
no_confirmed_issues: You haven't confirmed any issues yet.
location_modal_desc: We'll use your current location to tag this issue. This helps authorities locate and resolve the problem faster.
location_access_required: Location access is required to post issues in your area
geo_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by this browser
invalid_coords: Invalid location coordinates. Please try again.
failed_get_address: Failed to get location address. Please try again.
location_denied: Location access denied. Please enable location permissions.
location_unknown_error: An unknown error occurred while getting location.
already_confirmed: You have already confirmed this issue.
check_out_issue: Check out this issue on LocalAwaaz
view_details_placeholder: View details to see more information about this issue.
flag_req_location: Location required to flag an issue.
flag_failed: Failed to flag issue. You may have already flagged it.
no_posted_issues: You haven't posted any issues yet.
edit_note: Note: To update location or media, please delete and report a new issue.
set_location_desc: Please set your location to continue. You can use your current location or search for any area.
search_location_desc: Search for any location to view issues from that area.
search_placeholder: Search for a city, pincode, or area...
try_broader_search: Try searching for a broader area or pincode
location_required_feed: Location is required to view your local feed.
failed_search_location: Failed to search location. Please try again.
failed_save_location: Failed to save location. Please try again.
failed_get_current_location: Failed to get current location. Please enable location permissions.
no_saved_issues: You haven't saved any issues yet.
faq_how_report: How do I post a report?
lokai_req_image_upload: To complete your audio report, please click the '+' icon and upload an image.
lokai_req_exact_location: Please provide it exactly as 'State, City, Pincode' (e.g. 'Uttar Pradesh, Sultanpur, 228001').
lokai_drafted_audio: I've drafted the report from your audio! However, LocalAwaaz requires an image for all issues. Please click the '+' icon to upload an image of the problem (max 30MB).
lokai_process_media_fail: I couldn't process that media properly.
lokai_upload_fail: Failed to upload and analyze media.
lokai_relevant_issues: Here are the most relevant issues I found based on your request:
lokai_server_err: Sorry, I am having trouble connecting to the server.
lokai_req_gps: I need your exact GPS coordinates to submit this report. Since location services are disabled, please click 'Modify Details' to capture your location on the map.
lokai_req_text_location: To complete your draft, I need your State, City, and Pincode. Please reply with them separated by commas (e.g. 'Uttar Pradesh, Sultanpur, 228001').
lokai_report_ready: Your report is ready! What would you like to do?
lokai_submit_success: Success! Your issue has been officially reported to LocalAwaaz.
title: Title
lokai_desc: Your civic assistant. Describe an issue, check your city's leaderboard, or upload a photo/audio to instantly draft a report.
tell_about_yourself: Tell us a little about yourself
issue_not_found: Issue not found or has been deleted
no_issues_neighborhood: There are no reported issues in your current neighborhood right now. Enjoy the peace, or be the first to report something that needs attention.
ai_req_image: AI requires an image to analyze the issue.
ai_req_location: AI needs your State, City, Pincode OR GPS Location to draft accurately.
ai_fill_fail: Failed to generate AI details. Please type manually.
files_max_3: file(s). You can only have a maximum of 3 files.
invalid_img_type: Only PNG, JPG, JPEG images are allowed.
select_files_first: Please select files to upload first
upload_fail_retry: Failed to upload files. Please try again.
title_length: Title must be at least 3 characters long
desc_length: Description must be at least 10 characters long
click_upload_before_submit: Please click 'Upload Files' before submitting your issue.
report_desc: Help improve your neighborhood by reporting issues directly to local authorities.
select_category_desc: Choose the category that best describes your issue
location_placeholder: e.g., Near SBI Bank, Main Road
gps_desc: Click 'Get Current Location' to capture your GPS coordinates.
img_formats_limit: PNG, JPG, JPEG only(max 3 files, 30MB total)
anon_desc: Your personal details won't be shown to the public
issue_review_shortly: Your report has been received and will be reviewed shortly.
start_reporting_badges: Start reporting issues to earn badges!
